title: Virginia Advances in ACC Tourney with Victory Over NC State
summary: No. 10 Virginia defeats NC State 81-74 for the third time this season in the ACC Tournament. Malik Thomas scored 16 points.
charlotte_impact: Virginia's continued success in the ACC Tournament impacts their postseason aspirations and local sports fans.

title: Virginia Secures Win Against NC State
summary: Virginia defeated N.C. State for the third time this season, with Malik Thomas and Thijs De Ridder leading the scoring.
charlotte_impact: This win is crucial for Virginia's momentum in the ACC Tournament and their chances for a higher seed.

title: Virginia and NC State Face Off in ACC Tournament
summary: Virginia plays NC State in a quarterfinal round matchup at the 2026 ACC Tournament in Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: This game is a key contest in the ACC Tournament, determining which team advances further.

title: NC State vs. Virginia: ACC Tournament Preview
summary: NC State Wolfpack meet the No. 11 Virginia Cavaliers in an ACC Tournament quarterfinal in Charlotte, North Carolina.
charlotte_impact: The outcome of this game will affect both teams' standings in the ACC Tournament.

title: Serious Crash on I-77 North Injures Two
summary: A crash on I-77 North near Uptown resulted in two injuries and the closure of a ramp lane for several hours.
charlotte_impact: Traffic incidents can cause significant disruptions and pose safety risks to commuters.

title: Union County Officials Search for Missing Woman
summary: Cquila Singleton was last seen on Feb. 26 and last contacted by phone on Feb. 28. Officials are seeking information.
charlotte_impact: Missing person cases raise community concerns and require resources for investigation and search efforts.

title: Warm Weekend Forecast After Cold Start
summary: After a cold Friday, temperatures are expected to rise into the 70s this weekend before a cool down early next week.
charlotte_impact: Weather forecasts influence outdoor activities and planning for residents in the Charlotte area.

title: Fatal Crash Reported in East Charlotte
summary: A fatal crash occurred near Plaza Midwood in east Charlotte, according to Medic reports.
charlotte_impact: Fatal crashes are a serious concern, impacting families and highlighting the need for road safety.

title: Body Found in East Charlotte Apartment, Woman Charged
summary: Police discovered a decomposing body in an east Charlotte apartment. A woman has been charged, and the victim has not been identified.
charlotte_impact: Homicides and suspicious deaths raise concerns about community safety and require thorough investigations.

title: Pussycat Dolls Announce Charlotte Tour Date
summary: The Pussycat Dolls are bringing their world tour to Charlotte in July 2026, performing at Truliant Amphitheater.
charlotte_impact: Concerts and events contribute to the local economy and provide entertainment for residents.

title: Early Pollen Season Impacts Carolinas
summary: A cold end to winter followed by a warm March has caused many trees to pollinate simultaneously, worsening pollen conditions.
charlotte_impact: High pollen levels affect allergy sufferers and can impact outdoor activities.

title: Double Fatality in Waxhaw Neighborhood
summary: A man and woman were found dead in a Waxhaw neighborhood. Police report no ongoing threat to the public.
charlotte_impact: Sudden deaths in residential areas can cause concern and require investigation to determine the cause.

title: Fatal Crash in North Charlotte
summary: One person died and another was injured in a crash on Statesville Road near Twin Lakes Parkway in north Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Traffic fatalities are a serious issue, highlighting the importance of safe driving practices.

title: Deputy Vacancies Across North Carolina Counties
summary: A survey reveals deputy vacancy rates ranging from 1% to nearly 18% across seven North Carolina counties.
charlotte_impact: Staffing shortages in law enforcement can impact public safety and response times.

title: CMPD Cruiser Overturns in Northeast Charlotte Crash
summary: A Charlotte-Mecklenburg Police Department (CMPD) cruiser overturned in a crash on North Tryon Street near Orr Road.
charlotte_impact: Incidents involving law enforcement vehicles raise concerns about safety and accountability.
